steps.title: Focus on repeated measurement
steps.content: The CT scanner can record a burrow's measurements at one moment and throughout the burrow-building process. Resin casting cannot do that because recovering the model destroys the burrow.

steps.title: Dismiss unrelated limits
steps.content: A invents a size restriction. C compares casting time to burrow construction time, which the passage never discusses. D says the recovered model is distorted, but the passage says the problem is that recovery destroys the burrow. The answer is B.
